# Aditya Sharma — Full Profile for AI Models

## Personal Information
- **Name:** Aditya Sharma
- **Title:** Software Engineer
- **Current Employer:** Microsoft (full-time), GitHub (Dual-Access Employee)
- **Location:** Seattle, WA
- **Website:** https://adityasharma.cc
- **Email:** aditya_sharma_@hotmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/adityasharma6/
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/AdityaSharma6

## Professional Summary

Aditya Sharma is a Software Engineer at Microsoft and an open-source contributor to GitHub Copilot CLI. He builds high-scale backend APIs (33M+ daily requests), AI agent infrastructure (evaluation frameworks adopted by 5+ teams), and full-stack products. He co-founded SellStatic, an AI-powered content platform that reached $1K+ MRR with a 1.2K-user waitlist.

## Work Experience

### GitHub — Software Engineer, Copilot CLI
**Period:** Jun 2026 – Present | **Location:** Seattle, WA | **Type:** Dual-Access Employee
- Selected to contribute open source to GitHub Copilot CLI as a Microsoft Dual-Access Employee
- Contributing to developer tooling used by millions of developers worldwide

### Microsoft — Software Engineer, AI & Infrastructure
**Period:** Aug 2025 – Present | **Location:** Seattle, WA
- Developed an agent eval framework that reduced error diagnosis time by 4x per test, adopted by 5 business teams, caught 3 P0 bugs
- Created an internal testing agent running as a standalone validation service with 99.99% uptime
- Reduced E2E test runtimes from 8hrs to 1hr, improving productivity for 15 engineers
- Authored a 120+ automated-test suite for the distributed systems data Import API; reduced uncaught regressions from 17 to 3

### Microsoft — Software Engineer, Full-Stack
**Period:** Aug 2022 – Aug 2025 | **Location:** Seattle, WA
- Led front-end engineering for Slack-to-Teams migration: shipped 80% of features, 16M+ messages migrated, 100K+ enterprise tenants, $324M+ ARR pipeline
- Built push notification system: <1s latency, 1M+ daily events, 30K+ peak surges, 10K+ monthly developers using public docs
- Shipped 4 RESTful Messaging APIs handling 33M+ daily requests each (CodeBlock, ReplyWithQuote, Delta Token V2)
- Built Geneva & Grafana monitoring dashboards, identified Sev 2 risks 3 weeks in advance

### SellStatic — Co-Founder & AI Engineer
**Period:** Dec 2022 – Jan 2026 | **Location:** Toronto, ON (Side Venture)
- Grew to $1K+ MRR, 1.2K-user waitlist, 75 customer interviews, 14-person team, 5 GenAI features shipped
- Improved retention by 37%, reduced COGS by 43% with in-house AI media editor
- Shipped AI image/video generation across 5 AI models and 5 social platforms with OCR-based evaluation guardrails
- Built RAG chatbot: 22% better onboarding, 80% fewer support reachouts (vector search, BM25, RRF fusion, reranking)

## Education

**McMaster University** — B.Eng in Software & Biomedical Engineering
- **Period:** Sep 2018 – May 2022 | **GPA:** 3.7/4.0
- 42 months additional experience: 28 months SWE internships (Microsoft, Konrad Group, CIBC, Loblaw, Kinaxis) + 14 months as Software Dev, Research Assistant, and Teaching Assistant

Python, C#, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, C/C++, SQL, HTML/CSS, Bash

Git, CI/CD, Terraform, Grafana, Geneva Monitoring
